name: Lord Robert
answer1:
My Lady Marcy
can tell thee
more!
answer2:
I know but
one of three
syllables.
question:
Dost thou wish
to know it now?
yes:
It is 'amo' seek
ye now the
other parts!

name: Lady Marcy
answer2:
Our people
believe in love
as a way of life
and live it to
the fullest!
question:
Dost thou
seek love?
no:
Then thou shalt
not find it!

name: Suzanna
job:
I am a lady
in waiting.
answer2:
There is a
paladin by the
name of Malchor.
He can lead thee
to the silver
horn!
question:
Art thou allowed
to be in here?
yes:
I doubt it!
Thou should
leave!

name: Life.
answer2:
Seek ye the
candle of love
for only with it
and two other
parts might thou
enter the abyss!
question:
Dost thou
have it?
no:
Ask the bard
beyond the
secret passage!

name: the pass guard
answer2:
Well not
compared to a
dungeon altar
room!
question:
Hast thou solved
the altars?
no:
From them a
three part key
is gained,
needed to enter
the chamber of
the codex!

name: a gate guard
answer2:
Here, in the oak
grove many find
the meaning of
peace and love!
question:
Art thou
saturated with
love?
yes:
Then thou need
not be here!
no:
Visit the small
shrine within
the abbey!

name: Derek the Bard
look:
A young bard
playing a lute.
job:
I am a bard,
I sing songs.
answer2:
The candle of
love is found in
a secret place
hidden off
Lock Lake!
question:
Dost thou like
this one?

name: Chinup
job:
I welcome thee
unto the Abbey!
answer2:
There four
profession types
seek truth!
question:
Art thou here in
search of love?

name: Diane
job:
I counsel those
who enter
the grove.
answer1:
Herein thou may
find insights
into love,
within thyself
or the others
here in the
grove.
question:
Art thou the
most loving
person?

name: Benjamin
answer1:
When the three
combine in eight
ways love alone
is compassion.
answer2:
Of the
eight avatar
attributes
compassion is
derived from
love alone.
question: Art thou well?

name: Deirdre
answer1:
When three build
eight, truth
tempered by love
becomes justice!
answer2:
Justice is one
of the eight
avatar virtues
and derives from
truth and love.
question: Art thou?

name: Thomas
job:
I am thinking of
love's part in
sacrifice.
answer1:
Love of others
and the courage
to face even
death is
self-sacrifice.
answer2:
Sacrifice is
built upon the
motive of love
and the ability
of courage.
question: Thyself?

name: Lastro
answer1:
My spirituality
is not a
religion, but a
searching to
know and improve
my own inner
being.
answer2:
My being is
based on my own
truth, love and
courage.
question: And thee?

name: Humlock
answer2:
I am but a poor
destitute beggar
I have nothing!
question:
Will you give me
some money?
no:
But I am in
most dire need!

name: Malchor
answer1:
My last quest
took me near
Spiritwood.
answer2:
Some say that
the silver horn
is buried on a
small isle off
the tip of
Spiritwood.
question:
Art thou
on a quest?

name: Brother Antos
health:
I am getting old
and frail.
answer1:
What dost thou
ask of me?
answer2:
Thou dost need
the candle of
love to enter
the abyss.
question:
Dost thou
know where
to find it?
no:
Meditate on love
at our shrine.
